description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a dark blue fabric. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all with clean, straight edges and no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and extend directly from the backrest to the front, with a subtle black accent band near the rear. The legs are slim, black, and metal, positioned at the corners and slightly inset, giving the sofa a floating appearance. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, maintaining the overall sleek and contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with a subtle texture visible in the fabric.
description: A sleek, modern dark blue sofa with straight lines, two large seat and back cushions, slim black metal legs, and minimalist armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low, straight armrest, the thickness of the cushions, and the slim black leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned backrest and the two back cushions, with the legs visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the straight armrest, cushion depth, and black accent band.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and aligned side by side with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests extending from the backrest to the front, with a subtle black accent band near the rear; no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners and slightly inset, giving a floating appearance; legs are straight and exposed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, attached cushions; continuous and unsegmented, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
